channel.title: Agentic Applications on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic Applications on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Agent Memory Toolkit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now has a public preview of the Agent Memory Toolkit, a code-first toolkit for building agent memory systems. It is intended to support scalable, durable, and cost-efficient memory for agentic applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates
